title: Aureline export-risk (data risk) class vocabulary
description: Closed export-risk vocabulary frozen in docs/state/data_ownership_and_risk_taxonomy.md. These tokens classify the representation that crosses a boundary (preview/export/packet), not the underlying raw material referenced by opaque ids. The vocabulary is reused by support bundles, crash and diagnostic packets, recovery previews, and other export-manifested artifacts so surfaces do not mint local synonyms for 'safe to export'. Risk class is not a redaction algorithm; consumers must also apply the boundary-specific redaction contract (for example ADR-0007 for settings/sync value previews). Adding an enum value is additive-minor; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.
